task_completion.description: Verify the dedicated cache directory was created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal screenshot showing a command like 'mkdir -p /home/ga/geoserver/cache/countries' or an 'ls' command confirming the directory exists.

task_completion.description: Verify the new File System BlobStore is configured in GeoServer
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer 'BlobStores' page showing a File System blobstore named 'countries_store' with the Base Directory set to '/home/ga/geoserver/cache/countries'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'ne:ne_countries' layer is configured to use the new BlobStore
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer 'Edit Layer' page for 'ne:ne_countries', under the 'Tile Caching' tab, showing the BlobStore dropdown set to 'countries_store'.

task_completion.description: Verify a tile seed task was triggered for zoom levels 00-03
task_completion.visual_evidence: GeoServer 'Seed this layer' page for 'ne:ne_countries' showing a Seed operation configured with Zoom start '00' and Zoom stop '03', or the GWC task list showing this active/completed task.

task_completion.description: Verify tiles were actually written to the new directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal screenshot showing the contents of '/home/ga/geoserver/cache/countries' (e.g., using 'ls', 'tree', or 'find') with visible tile directories or files generated inside it.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the real GeoServer instance
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show 'localhost:8080/geoserver' during the configuration steps.

integrity.description: Verify directory creation and tile verification were done in a real terminal
integrity.visual_evidence: Commands like 'mkdir' and 'ls' should be executed in a genuine terminal emulator, not typed into a text editor or mocked.

integrity.description: Verify the seed operation was triggered via the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen interacting with the GeoWebCache Seed UI (clicking submit, viewing task status) rather than just manually copying files into the cache directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected BlobStore name is exactly 'countries_store' and its path must be '/home/ga/geoserver/cache/countries'. The target layer to configure and seed is 'ne:ne_countries'. A successful seed for zoom levels 00-03 should generate at least 10 tiles in the new directory.
